leadText: The Red Scarf (Japanese: あかいバンダナ Red Bandanna) is a type of held item introduced in Generation III. It increases the holder's Coolness in a Pokémon Contest.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] This section is incomplete. Please feel free to edit this section to add missing information and complete it. Reason: Check how much exactly is raised by this item in all generations When held by a Pokémon, it raises its Coolness in the primary round of a Pokémon Contest , the Visual Competition of a Super Contest , and the Introduction Round of a Contest Spectacular . In Generation III , it is raised by 20 points, up to a total of 255 points.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description R S E A hold item that raises Cool in Contests . FR LG An item to be held by a Pok é mon . It boosts the holding Pok é mon 's Cool condition in Contests . Colo XD An item brought over from a faraway place. D P Pt An item to be held by a Pokémon. It boosts the "Cool" aspect of the holder in a Contest. HG SS An item to be held by a Pokémon. It boosts the "Cool" aspect of the holder in a Contest in Sinnoh. B W B2 W2 An item to be held by a Pokémon. It boosts the Cool aspect of the holder in a Contest. X Y An item to be held by a Pokémon. During a Contest, it raises the Cool aspect of the Pokémon holding it. OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh LA An item to be held by a Pokémon. During a contest, it raises the Cool aspect of the Pokémon holding it. BD SP An item to be held by a Pokémon. During a Super Contest Show, it raises the Coolness of the Pokémon holding it. S V When a Pokémon holds this during a contest, it looks even cooler than usual.

sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] The various Manaphy distributions having a Red Scarf as a held item may be a reference to May 's bandana held by Manaphy in the movie Pokémon Ranger and the Temple of the Sea .
